plugins.name: edloidas-review
plugins.description: A curated Codex-safe review bundle for React analysis, comment quality audits, PR feedback triage, and post-change cleanup.
plugins.shortDescription: React review, comment audits, PR feedback triage, and cleanup.
plugins.longDescription: Install the Codex-ready review bundle from edloidas/skills for React code review, comment-quality audits, review-comment triage, and post-implementation cleanup.

plugins.name: edloidas-audit
plugins.description: A Codex-safe audit bundle for skill quality, GitHub Actions, ESLint and Biome overlap, package scripts, and monorepo workspace configuration.
plugins.shortDescription: Audit skills, CI, lint overlap, scripts, and workspace setup.
plugins.longDescription: Install the audit bundle from edloidas/skills to inspect skill quality, CI workflows, ESLint and Biome overlap, package scripts, and pnpm workspace configuration from Codex.

plugins.name: edloidas-workflow
plugins.description: A Codex-safe workflow bundle for instruction-file sync, issue drafting and triage, release prep, commit summaries, label management, and Git worktree management.
plugins.shortDescription: Instruction sync, issue flow, releases, labels, and worktrees.
plugins.longDescription: Install lightweight Git and GitHub workflow helpers from edloidas/skills for syncing repo instruction files, drafting and prioritizing issues, validating npm releases, summarizing commits, managing labels, and working across multiple worktrees.

plugins.name: edloidas-obsidian
plugins.description: A Codex-ready helper for maintaining structured working documents in an Obsidian vault.
plugins.longDescription: Install the Obsidian working-docs helper from edloidas/skills to manage active task notes with a consistent vault structure.

plugins.name: edloidas-tools
plugins.description: A Codex-ready integration bundle for inspecting Railway services, logs, variables, and deploy state.
plugins.longDescription: Install the Railway integration from edloidas/skills to inspect services, logs, environment variables, and deployment status from Codex.
